properties.name: Lake House Retreat
properties.headline: A quiet place to exhale
properties.checkInNote: Check-in starts at 4:00 PM. The smart lock code is sent on the morning of arrival.
properties.checkoutNote: Checkout is at 10:00 AM. Please start the dishwasher and lock the door behind you.
houseTips: Beach towels are in the hallway closet.
The thermostat tablet is mounted near the kitchen.

properties.name: City Loft Stay
properties.headline: Right in the middle of the neighborhood
properties.checkInNote: Self check-in begins at 3:00 PM. The entry guide is in your Airbnb messages.
properties.checkoutNote: Checkout is at 11:00 AM. Leave used towels in the bathroom hamper.
houseTips: The building door auto-locks after 30 seconds.
Street parking is free after 6:00 PM.
A white noise machine is on the bedside table.

stays.message: We are so happy to host you. Make yourself at home and enjoy the water views.
Welcome to the loft. We hope you have a memorable and easy stay in the city.
